race.comment: Open affair. SASSY FOR SURE (10) has been knocking on the door all campaign without quite putting it all together. The form around her reads strongly and with a touch of luck she can finally break through. GLOBAL TURN (2) draws low and possesses a sharp turn of foot, though she lacks early speed. If the gaps open at the right time, she's capable of bursting through late to grab them. EXTRA HOT (8) caught the eye making ground from the back a fortnight ago and should be nearing peak fitness now. Drawn kinder this time and retains the 3kg claim. VANLEE (7) is a likely improver second-up and is among the chances.
